mismatch.description: The schema defines regime metadata as a nested 'regime_context' object with fields: regime_id, regime_confidence, proximity, duration_days, decision. The live API was emitting these as flat top-level fields: regime, regime_confidence, regime_duration_days, proximity.
mismatch.remediation_applied: Restructure flat regime fields into a nested regime_context object. Map: regime → regime_context.regime_id, regime_confidence → regime_context.regime_confidence, regime_duration_days → regime_context.duration_days (integer), proximity → regime_context.proximity. Add regime_context.decision derived from regime policy (SUPPRESS_DIRECTION → NO_TRADE, PUBLISH → EXECUTE).

patch.description: Replaced flat regime fields (regime, regime_confidence, regime_duration_days, proximity) with a nested regime_context object matching the schema definition. Added decision field derived from regime policy (SUPPRESS_DIRECTION → NO_TRADE, PUBLISH → EXECUTE). Ensured duration_days is integer via Math.floor().
patch.code_before: regime, regime_confidence: regimeConf, regime_duration_days: dur, proximity: prox,
patch.code_after: regime_context: { regime_id: regime, regime_confidence: regimeConf, proximity: prox, duration_days: Math.floor(dur), decision: regimeDecision },

conformance_command: python3 check_conformance.py --endpoint http://localhost:8080/signals/latest --schema producer_signal_schema.json --mismatch regime_context_flat --before-snapshot snapshots/before_mismatch4_5.json -o conformance_receipt.json --summary

limitations.description: Before snapshot is stored, not captured live in same session
Conformance checks single mismatch, not full schema validation
Point-in-time check; future code changes could regress
Policy consistency check infers expected action from gate flags, not from source logic
INVERT conditional check (weak_symbol metadata) not fully testable under SYSTEMIC regime
After snapshot fetched at check time; signals may differ from moment of patch verification
